ogTitle: Dampier vs Dampier Archipelago: Climate Safety

heading: Dampier vs Dampier Archipelago — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dampier, Western Australia and Dampier Archipelago, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dampier Archipelago has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Dampier (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dampier or Dampier Archipelago safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dampier has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Dampier Archipelago scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dampier scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Dampier Archipelago scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dampier or Dampier Archipelago?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dampier Archipelago has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
